text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Hey, got a moment? You know how I have 
supplementary lessons, like, now?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Well, my besties just texted me, and they're in a pinch! Like, for real for real!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
So I have to go help them out, obvs! 
They can't go home 'til they score full 
points in karaoke!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
So, like, you're cool to go study 
for me, right? Thaaanks!☆ …No?
